'''Kreegons''' were extinct predators once indigenous to the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. [[Morag]] once reanimated a kreegon skeleton.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 8|''Ewoks'' (1985) 8]] {{1st}}
